targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "Readings"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sensor_id)::BIGINT AS "Active Sensors"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT source)::BIGINT AS "Sources"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quality_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Valid %"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(time))) / 60.0 AS "Latest Age"
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}';

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT dropped_readings_total FROM ingestion_metrics ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 1), 0)::BIGINT AS "Dropped"
;

SELECT
  recorded_at AS "time",
  'Readings/sec' AS metric,
  readings_per_second AS value
FROM ingestion_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
ORDER BY recorded_at;

SELECT
  recorded_at AS "time",
  'Channel Fill' AS metric,
  channel_fill_pct AS value
FROM ingestion_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
ORDER BY recorded_at;

SELECT
  recorded_at AS "time",
  'Dropped Total' AS metric,
  dropped_readings_total AS value
FROM ingestion_metrics
WHERE $__timeFilter(recorded_at)
ORDER BY recorded_at;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
    WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
    WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
    ELSE metric
  END || ' · ' || CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric IN ('PM2.5', 'O3', 'NO2')
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
    WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
    WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
    WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
    WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
    ELSE metric
  END || ' · ' || CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS metric,
  AVG(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric IN ('temperature', 'humidity', 'wind_speed', 'precipitation', 'water_gage_height')
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', time) AS "time",
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
    WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
    WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
    ELSE metric
  END AS metric,
  SUM(value)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
  AND metric IN ('bike_available_count', 'dock_available_count', 'station_capacity')
  AND quality_flag = 1
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY readings DESC;

SELECT
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
    WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
    WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
    WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
    WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
    WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
    WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
    WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
    WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
    WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
    WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
    ELSE metric
  END AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY metric
ORDER BY readings DESC;

SELECT
  sensor_id,
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  AVG(latitude)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS latitude,
  AVG(longitude)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS longitude,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings,
  MAX(time) AS latest_reading_at
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY sensor_id, source
ORDER BY latest_reading_at DESC;

SELECT
  sensor_id,
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  COUNT(DISTINCT metric)::INTEGER AS metrics,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings,
  COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quality_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS valid_pct,
  MAX(time) AS latest_reading_at,
  CASE WHEN MAX(time) >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' THEN 'Fresh' ELSE 'Stale' END AS status
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY sensor_id, source
ORDER BY latest_reading_at DESC;

SELECT DISTINCT ON (sensor_id, metric)
  time,
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  sensor_id,
  CASE metric
    WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
    WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
    WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
    WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
    WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
    WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
    WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
    WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
    WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
    WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
    WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
    ELSE metric
  END AS metric,
  value,
  unit,
  CASE quality_flag WHEN 1 THEN 'Valid' WHEN 0 THEN 'Suspect' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS quality
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
ORDER BY sensor_id, metric, time DESC
LIMIT 200;

SELECT
  CASE quality_flag WHEN 1 THEN 'Valid' WHEN 0 THEN 'Suspect' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS quality,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS readings
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY quality_flag
ORDER BY quality;

SELECT
  CASE source
    WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
    WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
    WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
    WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
    WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
    ELSE source
  END AS source,
  COALESCE(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN quality_flag = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS valid_pct
FROM sensor_readings
WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
  AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
  AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
  AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
GROUP BY source
ORDER BY valid_pct ASC;

WITH exceptions AS (
  SELECT
    time,
    CASE source
      WHEN 'simulator' THEN 'City Sensor Network'
      WHEN 'openaq' THEN 'Air Quality Network'
      WHEN 'openmeteo' THEN 'Chicago Weather Station'
      WHEN 'gbfs' THEN 'Divvy Bike Share'
      WHEN 'usgs' THEN 'Chicago River Gauge'
      ELSE source
    END AS source,
    sensor_id,
    CASE metric
      WHEN 'PM2.5' THEN 'PM2.5'
      WHEN 'O3' THEN 'Ozone'
      WHEN 'NO2' THEN 'Nitrogen Dioxide'
      WHEN 'temperature' THEN 'Temperature'
      WHEN 'humidity' THEN 'Humidity'
      WHEN 'wind_speed' THEN 'Wind Speed'
      WHEN 'precipitation' THEN 'Precipitation'
      WHEN 'bike_available_count' THEN 'Available Bikes'
      WHEN 'dock_available_count' THEN 'Open Docks'
      WHEN 'station_capacity' THEN 'Station Capacity'
      WHEN 'water_gage_height' THEN 'River Gage Height'
      ELSE metric
    END AS metric,
    value::TEXT AS value,
    unit,
    CASE quality_flag WHEN 0 THEN 'Suspect' ELSE 'Invalid' END AS quality
  FROM sensor_readings
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time)
    AND source ~ '${source:regex}'
    AND metric ~ '${metric:regex}'
    AND sensor_id ~ '${sensor_id:regex}'
    AND quality_flag <> 1
  ORDER BY time DESC
  LIMIT 50
), clean_audit AS (
  SELECT
    NOW() AS time,
    'All Sources' AS source,
    'All Sensors' AS sensor_id,
    'All Metrics' AS metric,
    '0' AS value,
    'exceptions' AS unit,
    'Clean audit: no suspect or invalid readings in the selected window' AS quality
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM exceptions)
)
SELECT * FROM exceptions
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM clean_audit
ORDER BY time DESC;

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "AI Flags"
FROM video_activity_predictions
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
  AND is_suspicious = TRUE;

SELECT COUNT(*)::BIGINT AS "High Severity"
FROM video_activity_predictions
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
  AND is_suspicious = TRUE
  AND severity IN ('high', 'critical');

SELECT COALESCE((
  SELECT confidence
  FROM video_activity_predictions
  WHERE camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
  ORDER BY event_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
), 0)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS "Confidence";

WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    event_time AS "time",
    city,
    camera_id,
    location_name,
    display_label AS possible_activity,
    confidence,
    severity,
    review_status
  FROM video_activity_predictions
  WHERE camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
    AND is_suspicious = TRUE
  ORDER BY event_time DESC
  LIMIT 1
), empty_state AS (
  SELECT NOW() AS "time", 'n/a' AS city, 'n/a' AS camera_id, 'n/a' AS location_name, 'No AI flags in selected data yet' AS possible_activity, 0::DOUBLE PRECISION AS confidence, 'low' AS severity, 'pending' AS review_status
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM latest)
)
SELECT * FROM latest
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM empty_state
ORDER BY "time" DESC;

SELECT
  time_bucket('5 minutes', event_time) AS "time",
  CASE WHEN is_suspicious THEN 'AI-flagged possible activity' ELSE 'Normal review frame' END AS metric,
  COUNT(*)::DOUBLE PRECISION AS value
FROM video_activity_predictions
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
GROUP BY 1, 2
ORDER BY 1;

SELECT
  display_label AS possible_activity,
  COUNT(*)::INTEGER AS flags
FROM video_activity_predictions
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
  AND is_suspicious = TRUE
GROUP BY display_label
ORDER BY flags DESC;

WITH flags AS (
  SELECT
    event_time AS "time",
    city,
    camera_id,
    location_name,
    display_label AS possible_activity,
    ROUND(confidence::numeric, 3) AS confidence,
    ROUND(crime_score::numeric, 3) AS crime_score,
    ROUND(COALESCE(type_score, 0)::numeric, 3) AS type_score,
    severity,
    review_status,
    media_uri
  FROM video_activity_predictions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
    AND camera_id ~ '${camera_id:regex}'
    AND is_suspicious = TRUE
  ORDER BY event_time DESC
  LIMIT 100
), empty_state AS (
  SELECT NOW() AS "time", 'n/a' AS city, 'n/a' AS camera_id, 'n/a' AS location_name, 'No AI-flagged possible suspicious activity in the selected window' AS possible_activity, 0::numeric AS confidence, 0::numeric AS crime_score, 0::numeric AS type_score, 'low' AS severity, 'pending' AS review_status, 'n/a' AS media_uri
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM flags)
)
SELECT * FROM flags
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM empty_state
ORDER BY "time" DESC;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Source
list.name: source
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT source FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Metric
list.name: metric
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT metric FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT sensor_id FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Sensor
list.name: sensor_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT sensor_id FROM sensor_readings ORDER BY 1;

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT camera_id FROM video_activity_predictions ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Camera
list.name: camera_id
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT camera_id FROM video_activity_predictions ORDER BY 1;
